testcase.name: test_evite_cms_admin_redirect

self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_cms_admin_redirect.TestEviteCMSAdminRedirect object at 0x7fec2dc0e240> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fec0fcfc500>
def test_evite_cms_admin_redirect(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page = config.pages["page"] _redirect_url = "cstool/admin_login"
# get_url checks if sub_page_url in current_url but in this case redirect happens environment_url = settings.get_url_string(config.environment) _cms_admin_url = environment_url + "admin/cms"
config.driver.get(_cms_admin_url) > page.setup_default_cookies()
_cms_admin_url = 'https://www.evite.comadmin/cms' _redirect_url = 'cstool/admin_login' _test_name = 'test_evite_cms_admin_redirect' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fec0fcfc500> environment_url = 'https://www.evite.com' logger = <Logger test_evite_cms_admin_redirect (INFO)> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fec0fcfd070> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_cms_admin_redirect.TestEviteCMSAdminRedirect object at 0x7fec2dc0e240>

self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7fec0fcfe570> response = {'status': 400, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"invalid cookie domain","message":"invalid cookie domain\\n (Session info...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]\\n"}}'}
def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.InvalidCookieDomainException: Message: invalid cookie domain E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00D40283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x00CCB234] E (No symbol) [0x00BA0300] E (No symbol) [0x00C3F360] E (No symbol) [0x00C0CF3C] E (No symbol) [0x00C2E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x00C0CD36] E (No symbol) [0x00BDBD29] E (No symbol) [0x00BDD064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0104B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x010622BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0105C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00DD9C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00CD45BD] E (No symbol) [0x00CD14A8] E (No symbol) [0x00CD1647] E (No symbol) [0x00CC3D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x76925D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]
e = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorCode object at 0x7fec0fcfe960> error_code = 'INVALID_COOKIE_DOMAIN' error_codes = ['DETACHED_SHADOW_ROOT', 'ELEMENT_CLICK_INTERCEPTED', 'ELEMENT_IS_NOT_SELECTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_INTERACTABLE', 'ELEMENT_NOT_VISIBLE', 'IME_ENGINE_ACTIVATION_FAILED', ...] error_info = [24, 'invalid cookie domain'] exception_class = <class 'selenium.common.exceptions.InvalidCookieDomainException'> message = 'invalid cookie domain\n (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126)' response = {'status': 400, 'value': '{"value":{"error":"invalid cookie domain","message":"invalid cookie domain\\n (Session info...9+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]\\n"}}'} screen = None self = <selenium.webdriver.remote.errorhandler.ErrorHandler object at 0x7fec0fcfe570> st_value = '\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00D40283+25139]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00CCB234]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00BA0300]\n\t(No symbol) [0x00C3...0x76925D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]\n' stacktrace = ['\tGetHandleVerifier [0x00D40283+25139]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00CCB234]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00BA0300]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00C3F360]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00C0CF3C]', '\t(No symbol) [0x00C2E6E1]', ...] status = 'invalid cookie domain' value = {'error': 'invalid cookie domain', 'message': 'invalid cookie domain\n (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126)', 'stack...x76925D49+25]\n\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107]\n\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]\n'} value_json = '{"value":{"error":"invalid cookie domain","message":"invalid cookie domain\\n (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126)"...49+25]\\n\\tRtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107]\\n\\tRtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]\\n"}}'

testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event

skipped.message: DB have no record for sql: SELECT user_first_name,user_last_name FROM public.evite_users WHERE user_email_addr = 'evite-09032025-132904-97-test@evitetest.com' ORDER BY random();

testcase.error:
def tear_down(): logger.info(f"Start {inspect.stack()[0][3]}")
if test_failed["value"]: ScreenShotHelper(test_name).take_screen_shot(driver)
if "gridlastic" in _selenium_hub_url.lower(): # logger.warning(f"Video: http://s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/027a15f2-530d-31e5-f8cc-7ceaf6355377/6aabf53f-1881-9622-7d9d-50a59e24f562/play.html?" + driver.session_id) logger.warning( f"Video: https://s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com/6ca5b6bd-816f-45ea-b0af-d33a1627f21e/6aabf53f-1881-9622-7d9d-50a59e24f562/play.html?" + driver.session_id )
# This doesn't work anymore https://github.com/SeleniumHQ/selenium/issues/15772 # Save console errors if any # From https://stackoverflow.com/questions/20907180/ # /getting-console-log-output-from-chrome-with-selenium-python-api-bindings
error_logs = [] from pprint import pformat
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver import WebDriver as ChromeDriver
messages = ChromeDriver.get_log(driver, "browser")
for entry in messages: if entry["level"] == "SEVERE" or entry["level"] == "ERROR": if "appsignal" in entry["message"]: continue error_logs.append(entry)
if error_logs: logger.exception(f"Found {len(error_logs)} SEVERE/ERROR network error(s) during testing") formatted_logs = pformat(error_logs, indent=2, compact=True) logger.exception(f"Errors:\n{formatted_logs}")
# Delete cookies for next session to run clean > test_config.pages["page"].evt_clean_up()
ChromeDriver = <class 'selenium.webdriver.chrome.webdriver.WebDriver'> _selenium_hub_url = 'https://srPxQAUK9ol2T4yuRbKYw7UBhXZ2qYkI:gZ6XqQxp5JhODG9kHJ83GTuOGkGX8Rvf@eu839yns-hub.gridlastic.com/wd/hub' driver = <selenium.webdriver.remote.webdriver.WebDriver (session="52ca800536db1a357b8a7bb785e6fd7e")> error_logs = [] logger = <Logger test_evite_cms_admin_redirect (INFO)> messages = [] pformat = <function pformat at 0x7fec2e196160> test_config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fec0fcfc500> test_failed = {'value': True} test_name = 'test_evite_cms_admin_redirect'

def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.WebDriverException: Message: <unknown>: Failed to read the 'localStorage' property from 'Window': Access is denied for this document. E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00D40283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x00CCB234] E (No symbol) [0x00BA04A3] E (No symbol) [0x00BA6EA1] E (No symbol) [0x00BA9203] E (No symbol) [0x00C2F6C5] E (No symbol) [0x00C0CF3C] E (No symbol) [0x00C2E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x00C0CD36] E (No symbol) [0x00BDBD29] E (No symbol) [0x00BDD064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0104B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x010622BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0105C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00DD9C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x00CD45BD] E (No symbol) [0x00CD14A8] E (No symbol) [0x00CD1647] E (No symbol) [0x00CC3D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x76925D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7773CEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7773CE41+561]
